text:
so all 
individuals eligible for extra help receive a full (100%) subsidy. Prior to 2024, beneficiaries eligible for 
extra help may have received full or partial subsidies (e.g., 25-, 50-, or 75%-Part D low-income subsidy 
[LIS] or low-income total premium subsidy [LIPS]). This means the cost share group monthly values 05, 
06, 07 and 08 are retired and no longer used after 2023. 

Effective with MBSF ABDC V2, a beneficiary with a verified or unverified date of death will have a ‘00’
